name: Eternity Warriors VR
short_description: Packed with classical action game essences, high-definition visual, and real-time multiplayer features.
detailed_description:
THE TRUE ACTION VR GAME



Become one of 3 heroes as you take on devilish monsters and fight through a world of chaos to find out the truth of the Eternity Warriors.

Join us on Disord !

AWARDS


  • Tencent’s "Best VR Game" (2017)
  • HTC and NVIDIA’s "Best Graphics VR Game" (2017)
  • HTC "Best VR Games" (2017) Nominee
  • Golden Plume Award "Best VR Game" (2017)

ACTION PACKED

  • Immersive, heart-stopping gameplay
  • Arcade style combat
  • Collect Trophies and share them at communities
  • Short mission based sessions

3 HEROES TO CHOOSE FROM

  • Hack & slash through enemies, or rain down fire upon them
  • Play as The Warrior, The Hunter, or The Gunner

HIGH DEFINITION VISUALS!

  • Stunning visuals, and apocalyptic environments
  • Epic boss battles
  • New fierce characters, and classic monsters from the original mobile games

MULTIPLAYER GAMEPLAY

Battle along with fellow heroes in real-time co-op multiplayer

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese, Russian, German, French, Spanish - Spain, Korean
*languages with full audio support
